name: Tchin Tchin Bar
tagline: An intimate Chinatown wine and cocktail bar with dim lighting, curated playlist, and a sophisticated but unpretentious vibe.
talkStory: Opened in 2016 by a collective of Chinatown creatives, 'tchin tchin' is the French equivalent of 'cheers.' The natural wine list is one of the best in Hawaii, sourced from small organic producers in France, Italy, and California. The unmarked entrance on Hotel Street adds speakeasy mystique. Off-duty sommeliers and chefs from Honolulu's top restaurants make this their after-shift decompression spot.
